description: Product description Heavy duty, multi-purpose A4 tuff bag made of transparent, reinforced, waterproof material. 35 x 25cm. Ideal for storing stationery, tools, cash, and other small items. 100% 550 micron mesh material. Hand wash. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
